title: Search boards by name
excerpt: Hello! Any plans to have Boards search by name to API? Any workaround which does not require pulling all boards and search names?

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! Any plans to have Boards search by name to API? Any workaround which does not require pulling all boards and search names?

posts.author: alessandra (Alessandra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Nir-Jetpack!

While we do not have plans to allow search by name via the API, we will take your feedback into consideration!

As a workaround which could save you from pulling all boards and names every time, you could consider pulling this information once, storing board names with board IDs and searching your storage by name to return a board ID. This can then be used in a board query whenever you need information of a board and are relying on board names.
